commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an OpenAI Realtime SSRF policy that allows RFC 2544 and IPv6 unique-local fake-IP DNS answers only for api.openai.com, with voice and transcription tests asserting the policy.

PR surface: Source +7, Tests +15. Total +22 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main has no policy on the Realtime session-secret fetch while the SSRF guard blocks RFC 2544 and IPv6 unique-local resolved addresses unless policy opts in. I did not run a live current-main proxy repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can replace the raw security-policy object with the existing helper while preserving the PR's intended behavior and tests.
